---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Empagliflozin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Empagliflozin</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Empagliflozin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Type 2 diabetes mellitus Jardiance is indicated in adults and children aged 10 years and above for the treatment of insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus as an adjunct to diet and...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.0%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（98.5%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（98.4%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（98.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（98.2%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（98.1%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（92.4%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（92.3%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（88.1%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（72.7%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（72.3%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（71.8%）</li>
<li>Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, demyelinating, type 1G（68.7%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（68.0%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（65.7%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（64.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
